title: @alexhillman: For the last 2 weeks I've been running this job/skill daily to auto prune claude...
rawContent:
Tweet by @alexhillman (📙 Alex Hillman)
Author bio: one of the first ~8,000 people on this site, somehow. left. now i'm back and working on @jfdibot to help me run my community, businesses, and more.
Text: For the last 2 weeks I've been running this job/skill daily to auto prune claude's automatic memory.md system and SHEESH what a difference. 

Run it once and see how it improves. If you like, set it up to run every day. 

https://t.co/KkcxIk9stQ
